title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!
